dry_run.description: Dry run (print changes without writing to DB)

backfill_mode.description: Sync mode. on-touch (default): edges written only when entity content changed. full-backfill: retroactive pass over all entities (ops-only, never available to scheduled cron).

intent.description: Intent to lazy-run (or "all" for every intent)

channels.description: CRX channels to probe (comma-separated, e.g. stable,dev,canary)

strict.description: Fail the job on drift (default true)

force_notify.description: Always send notification even if no drift

deploy_before_run.description: Sync /home/pv/pplx-lab to this branch+SHA and restart agentgateway before the hop matrix
